svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="数据隔离三层" id="td3"> <mxGraphModel dx="-474" dy="-137" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="380" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="l1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;" value="防线一：测试库独立
IT / E2E 连 test database，绝不连生产" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="280" x="60" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;" value="防线二：租户隔离
测试数据挂 test-tenant-*，不碰生产租户" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="280" x="60" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;" value="防线三：数据带前缀
test- 前缀 + 定时清理，防长期积累" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="280" x="60" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=12;" value="挡住：测试直接连生产库" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="300" x="400" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=12;" value="挡住：测试数据混进生产租户" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="300" x="400" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=12;" value="挡住：测试数据长期堆积污染" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="300" x="400" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="er1" edge="1" parent="1" source="l1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;" target="r1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="er2" edge="1" parent="1" source="l2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;" target="r2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="er3" edge="1" parent="1" source="l3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;" target="r3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;" value="三层叠加，某一层漏了另外两层兜底。测试数据的安全靠防线，不靠自觉。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="780" x="60" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));
